description: The UserRefToSyncRefAdapter component takes a UserRef type and drives a user ref field with what it has inside of it.

fields.User: The ref to get a user from.
fields.TargetReference: The field to drive with what user ``User`` refers to.
fields.WriteBack: Whether changes to the field ``TargetReference`` will update the value of ``User``. See write backs.

usage: Attach to a slot and provide values for all fields in order for this component to work.
